sentences.arabic: اَلْإِنْسَانُ الْمُسْلِمُ يَلْتَزِمُ بِالصِّدْقِ فِي كُلِّ أَقْوَالِهِ وَأَفْعَالِهِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman se pridržava istine u svim svojim riječima i djelima.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim adheres to honesty in all of his words and actions.

sentences.arabic: ذَكَرَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَنَّ الصِّدْقَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْبِرِّ، وَالْبِرَّ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ [أَخْرَجَهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَدَبِ].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, spomenuo je da istinoljubivost vodi ka dobročinstvu, a dobročinstvo vodi u Džennet [Zabilježio el-Buhari u Knjizi o edebu].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet, peace and blessings be upon him, mentioned that honesty leads to righteousness, and righteousness leads to Paradise [Reported by al-Bukhari in the Book of Manners].

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا أَنْ نَتَجَنَّبَ الْكَذِبَ لِأَنَّهُ يَضُرُّ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَيُغْضِبُ اللهَ تَعَالَى.
sentences.translation: Moramo izbjegavati laž jer ona šteti imanu i srdi Uzvišenog Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: We must avoid lying because it harms faith and angers Allah Almighty.

sentences.arabic: الصِّدْقُ يَجْعَلُ النَّاسَ يَثِقُونَ بِنَا وَيَنْشُرُ الْمَحَبَّةَ فِي الْمُجْتَمَعِ.
sentences.translation: Istinoljubivost čini da nam ljudi vjeruju i širi ljubav u zajednici.
sentences.translationEn: Honesty makes people trust us and spreads love within the community.
